overview.tagline: A family-friendly borough with excellent schools, quiet neighborhoods, and a strong community spirit
overview.description: Hillsdale is a well-established residential borough in northwestern Bergen County known for its excellent public schools, safe neighborhoods, and active community organizations. With a population of about 10,000, Hillsdale strikes a balance between suburban convenience and small-town character. The borough offers a mix of housing styles, from charming mid-century homes to newer construction, and its location provides easy access to both the Pascack Valley Line for NYC commuters and the outdoor recreation of northern Bergen County.
highlights: Highly rated public school district with strong academic programs
Pascack Valley Line train station for NYC commuters
Active recreation programs and youth sports leagues
Charming small-town downtown along Hillsdale Avenue
Close to Woodcliff Lake and Pascack Brook County Park

realEstate.assessmentInfo: Properties are assessed by the Bergen County Tax Assessor's office. The borough periodically conducts revaluations to align assessed values with market conditions.
realEstate.recentTrends: Hillsdale has experienced steady price appreciation with strong buyer demand, particularly among families attracted by the school district. Colonial and split-level homes from the 1950s-1970s make up much of the housing stock, with some newer construction on available lots.
neighborhoodNotes: Downtown area — Walking distance to the train station and shops on Hillsdale Avenue
Pascack Road corridor — Mix of residential homes and some commercial properties
Northern section — Quieter residential streets bordering Woodcliff Lake
Southern section — Family-friendly neighborhoods near schools and parks

trashCollection.title: Trash Collection
trashCollection.description: Curbside trash pickup is provided twice weekly by the Borough of Hillsdale.
details: Pickup occurs twice per week on designated days
Trash must be placed curbside by 6:00 AM on collection day
Use approved containers with secure lids, maximum 50 lbs per container
Bulk item pickup available by appointment
Holiday schedule adjustments posted on borough website

recycling.title: Recycling
recycling.description: Curbside recycling is collected weekly by the Borough.
details: Commingled recyclables (glass, cans, plastic) collected weekly
Paper and cardboard collected on the same day
Recycling bins available through the DPW
Yard waste collected seasonally from spring through fall
Electronics recycling events held periodically

waterSewer.title: Water & Sewer
waterSewer.description: Water service is provided by Veolia Water (formerly Suez Water) and sewer service is managed by the Borough.
details: Water supplied by Veolia Water New Jersey
Sewer service maintained by the Borough DPW
Water billing handled by Veolia quarterly
Sewer fees included on the borough tax bill
Water quality reports available online

permits.title: Building & Permits
permits.description: The Building Department handles construction permits, zoning approvals, and code enforcement.
details: Building permits required for construction, additions, and renovations
Zoning applications reviewed by the Planning Board and Zoning Board
Permit applications available at Borough Hall and online
Inspections scheduled through the Building Department
Certificate of Occupancy required for new construction

parking.title: Parking
parking.description: The Borough operates commuter parking lots near the train station and manages on-street parking regulations.
details: Commuter parking permits available for the Hillsdale train station lot
On-street parking available throughout residential areas
Overnight parking restrictions on certain borough streets
Snow emergency parking bans enforced during storms
Municipal lot available near the downtown area

additionalServices.title: Hillsdale Free Public Library
additionalServices.description: Full-service public library offering books, digital resources, programs, and meeting spaces.
details: Located at 509 Hillsdale Avenue
Children's story times, teen programs, and adult book clubs
Free Wi-Fi and computer access
Part of the Bergen County Cooperative Library System (BCCLS)

additionalServices.title: Recreation Department
additionalServices.description: Year-round recreational programs for all ages.
details: Youth sports leagues including baseball, soccer, basketball, and lacrosse
Summer recreation programs and day camps
Senior citizen programs and trips
Community events throughout the year

noise.title: Noise Ordinance
noise.summary: Hillsdale enforces noise regulations to maintain the peaceful character of residential neighborhoods.
keyRules: Construction noise prohibited before 7:00 AM and after 7:00 PM on weekdays
Saturday construction allowed 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
No construction noise on Sundays or federal holidays
Power equipment and leaf blowers restricted to daytime hours
Amplified music and loud gatherings subject to enforcement after 10:00 PM

propertyMaintenance.title: Property Maintenance
propertyMaintenance.summary: Property owners must maintain their properties in good condition.
keyRules: Lawns must be maintained and grass kept at a reasonable height
Sidewalk snow removal required within 24 hours after snowfall
Fences must meet borough height and setback requirements
Abandoned vehicles must be removed from property
Properties must be kept free of debris and unsightly conditions

pets.title: Pet Regulations
pets.summary: Hillsdale requires dog licensing and enforces leash laws.
keyRules: All dogs over 7 months must be licensed annually with rabies proof
Dogs must be leashed on all public property
Pet waste must be picked up immediately
Nuisance barking subject to enforcement
No exotic or wild animals permitted as pets

parking.title: Parking Regulations
parking.summary: Street parking is regulated throughout the borough.
keyRules: Overnight parking restricted on certain borough streets
Snow emergency parking bans — vehicles must be moved off-street
Commercial vehicles over 4 tons prohibited on residential streets overnight
Commuter lot parking requires a valid permit
Handicapped parking violations subject to fines

rentals.title: Rental Property Regulations
rentals.summary: Rental properties must comply with borough housing codes.
keyRules: Rental properties should be registered with the Borough
Properties must meet housing and fire safety codes
Landlords must maintain rental units to code standards
Inspections conducted at change of tenancy
Multi-family dwellings subject to additional requirements

other.title: Yard Sales
other.summary: Garage and yard sales are permitted with certain restrictions.
keyRules: Permit may be required from the Borough Clerk
Limited number of sales per year per household
Signs must be removed after the sale
Sales restricted to daytime hours

publicSchools.name: George G. White School
publicSchools.notes: Primary school serving the borough's youngest students

publicSchools.name: Meadowbrook School
publicSchools.notes: Intermediate school bridging primary and upper elementary

publicSchools.name: Ann Blanche Smith School
publicSchools.notes: Upper elementary school preparing students for middle school

publicSchools.name: Pascack Valley High School
publicSchools.notes: Regional high school serving Hillsdale and Woodcliff Lake; strong academics, athletics, and extracurriculars

privateSchools.name: St. John the Baptist Academy
privateSchools.notes: Catholic school serving the Hillsdale and surrounding communities

nearbyHigherEd: Ramapo College of New Jersey (Mahwah) — 20 minutes

whyMoveHere: Highly rated public schools including Pascack Valley High School
NJ Transit Pascack Valley Line train station in town
Affordable relative to many Bergen County communities
Active recreation programs and youth sports
Safe, family-friendly neighborhoods with engaged community
Convenient access to Route 17 and Garden State Parkway

commuteToNYC.duration: 55-70 minutes to Hoboken, then PATH or ferry to Manhattan
commuteToNYC.trainStation: Hillsdale Station (NJ Transit Pascack Valley Line)
commuteToNYC.notes: The Hillsdale train station provides direct service on the Pascack Valley Line to Hoboken Terminal. Service frequency is limited compared to main lines, with peak-hour trains approximately every 30 minutes. Bus route 165 provides alternative service to the Port Authority Bus Terminal.

costOfLiving.summary: Hillsdale offers a moderate cost of living for Bergen County, with housing prices near the county median and solid value for the quality of schools and services provided.
costOfLiving.vsStateAverage: Approximately 20% above the New Jersey state average

pros: Strong school district with well-regarded Pascack Valley High School
Train station in town for NYC commuting
More affordable than many northern Bergen County towns
Active community organizations and recreation programs
Close to outdoor recreation at Pascack Brook County Park
cons: Limited Pascack Valley Line train schedule compared to main lines
Downtown commercial area is small with limited dining options
Property taxes still relatively high by national standards
Route 17 traffic can impact local travel during peak hours
Older housing stock may require renovation

restaurants.name: Chestnut Deli & Catering
restaurants.description: Popular local deli offering sandwiches, hot entrees, catering, and a friendly neighborhood atmosphere.

restaurants.name: Hillsdale Luncheonette
restaurants.description: Classic luncheonette serving breakfast and lunch in a nostalgic, family-friendly setting.

restaurants.name: La Vecchia Ristorante
restaurants.description: Italian restaurant offering traditional pasta dishes, seafood, and a warm dining experience.

restaurants.name: Stony Hill Inn
restaurants.description: Historic inn and restaurant in nearby Hackensack offering fine dining in a charming colonial setting.

parks.name: Pascack Brook County Park
parks.description: Bergen County park featuring trails, sports fields, picnic areas, and Pascack Brook running through the grounds. Popular for walking, fishing, and family outings.

parks.name: Hillsdale Community Park
parks.description: Borough park with playgrounds, athletic fields, basketball courts, and open green space.

parks.name: Veterans Memorial Park
parks.description: Memorial park with monuments honoring local veterans, benches, and a reflective setting.

events.name: Hillsdale Community Day
events.description: Annual celebration featuring food, games, live entertainment, vendor booths, and activities for the whole family.

events.name: Memorial Day Parade
events.description: Annual Memorial Day parade and ceremony honoring veterans, organized by local veterans' organizations.

events.name: Holiday Tree Lighting
events.description: Annual borough tree lighting ceremony with carols, hot cocoa, and family activities.

attractions.name: Pascack Brook County Park
attractions.description: A scenic county park with walking trails along the brook, sports facilities, and abundant natural beauty.

attractions.name: Hillsdale Train Station
attractions.description: Historic NJ Transit station on the Pascack Valley Line, serving as a gateway for commuters and visitors.

shoppingAreas: Hillsdale Avenue — Small downtown with local businesses
Kinderkamack Road — Shops and services along the main corridor
Woodcliff Lake — Tice's Corner shopping area nearby

government.meetingSchedule: Borough Council meets the 1st and 3rd Tuesday of each month at 7:30 PM
government.meetingLocation: Borough Hall, 380 Hillsdale Avenue, Hillsdale, NJ 07642

hospitals.name: Hackensack Meridian Health — Pascack Valley Medical Center
Valley Hospital (Valley Health System)
hospitals.address: 223 North Van Dien Avenue, Ridgewood, NJ 07450

importantNumbers.label: Bergen County Office of Emergency Management
